detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use nandpsu driver.

sect1.title: xnandpsu_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XNandpsu driver directly. This example tests the erase, read and write features of the controller. The flash is erased and written. The data is read back and compared with the data written for correctness.
